free_text: Relative yields of the secondary p(alpha,xn) reactions
on bismuth at the energies of E(p)=120-660 MeV.
Target of very pure metallic Bi, weight from 0.2 g to
The yields of the different isotopes were calculated
from the average intensities of the individual alpha
groups, with account taken of their accumulation during
the irradiation period, the decay of activity before
the alpha-spectrum measurements began, the alpha decay
branching ratio of each isotope etc.
The indicated errors are the r.m.s. spreads
of the calculations for the individual
